opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This rough patch on my bald head suddenly got very sore yesterday, and when I touched it this evening, it started bleeding and feels burning hot.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A long-standing rough spot on my scalp suddenly became painful and bled — I'm worried it's cancer.

symptom_narrative.onset: one scalp spot became sore about 24 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: acute change over a day on a background present for years
symptom_narrative.character: rough dry patch, now sore, burning and bled a little when brushed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: left side of my bald scalp; I have lots of rough spots on scalp, face and hands
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the rough spots have been there for years, usually not sore

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: atrial fibrillation on a blood thinner
lots of sun damage / rough spots over years

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: apixaban (blood thinner) for my heart rhythm

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lots of past sun exposure; uses a walking stick

objective_data_offered.value: one 8mm crusty spot on the left bald scalp with a little dried blood; many rough scaly patches on scalp, face and backs of hands
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view only; cannot palpate for firmness/induration

objective_data_offered.value: small amount of bleeding, stopped with pressure
